title: centaurea stiriaca
intro: Centaurea stiriaca, also known as Stiff Knapweed or Star Knapweed, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Centaurea stiriaca include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Centaurea stiriaca is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used as a topical application for skin conditions like eczema and acne.
